metadata.name: Assign a Claim to an Adjuster

description: A new, complex disability claim has been filed and needs to be assigned to a senior claims adjuster.

nodes.task_description: Review the new claim to assess its complexity.

expected_outcome.value: A claims manager reviews the file and determines it requires an experienced adjuster.

nodes.task_description: Check the workload and specialty of available senior adjusters.

expected_outcome.value: The manager reviews the team's current assignments to find an adjuster with capacity.

nodes.task_description: Assign the claim to the selected adjuster.

expected_outcome.value: The manager successfully assigns the new claim to the appropriate adjuster's queue.
